name: poooof
description: A lightweight project framework: scaffold new projects (new-project), adopt or upgrade the framework in existing repos (adopt), run several features in parallel with git-worktree streams (start-stream / finish-stream), catch same-file merge overlap before it bites (check-streams), save a clean, verified session handoff before clearing the chat (handoff), keep the backlog dated and organized (tidy), update itself in one step (update), and convert a repo to the parallel-streams layout (convert-to-bare).
